name: Mexican Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown and drain the ground beef.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
3. Grease a 9x13 baking pan.
4. In a large skillet, combine the ground beef, taco seasoning, and undrained tomatoes. Cook over low heat for 10-15 minutes or until thickened.
5. Remove from heat and stir in half of the onion rings.
6. Line the bottom and sides of the pan with nine tortillas.
7. Pour the beef mixture into the pan.
8. Top with the remaining tortillas.
9. Mix cottage cheese, eggs, and one cup cheddar cheese in a separate bowl.
10. Pour the mixture over the beef mixture in the pan.
11. Cover and bake for 40-45 minutes or until the cottage cheese mixture is set.
12. Uncover, top with the remaining cheddar cheese and onion rings.
13. Return to oven for an additional 5 minutes.
14. Let set for about 10 minutes before serving.
15. Garnish with shredded lettuce and chopped tomatoes, if desired.
